name: Bubblr Inc.
summary: PART I . Except as otherwise specified here or as the context requires, references in this Annual Report to Bubblr, the Company, EthicalWeb.AI, EW, we, us, and our refer to Bubblr, Inc. and its fully owned subsidiaries, including Bubblr Limited and Bubblr Holdings Limited, which are a non-trading company and an IP holding company, respectively, both incorporated and operating under the laws of the United Kingdom.
